## [12:15 - 12:45]

solving smaller problems so that's the whole thing it's it's about taking that really big problem and breaking it down into pieces and giving solutions to those pieces along the way while you're still working into this final solution and the solution is to buy your product and so that is the problem solution path that's how you really deliver massive value without giving away the farm and deliver massive value in a way so it leads into the sale
